meta.tagline: Technology consulting & digital leadership from Riyadh
meta.description: Bin Askar Technology — a tech consultancy led by a CTO with 10+ years building digital products, solution architecture, applied AI, and digital transformation.

hero.title: Turning technology vision into digital products that deliver
hero.subtitle: A technology consultancy led by Abdullah Bin Askar, a CTO with over a decade of experience across telecom, government, and digital products.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From strategy to delivery — one technical partner for your digital journey.

cto.title: CTO as a Service
cto.description: Executive technology leadership: vision, architecture, engineering teams, and delivery aligned with business goals.

strategy.title: Strategy & Digital Transformation
strategy.description: Technology roadmaps, legacy modernization, and measurable digital transformation initiatives.

architecture.title: Solution Architecture
architecture.description: Scalable platform design: microservices, DDD, CQRS, and enterprise integrations.

ai.title: Applied AI
ai.description: RAG, intelligent agents, evaluation & quality, and production-safe AI integration into your products.

product.title: Digital Product Engineering
product.description: From idea to launch: product discovery, engineering, development, and CI/CD for digital products.

methodology.title: Our Methodology
methodology.subtitle: A clear process connecting strategy to execution.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: Understand the business, stakeholders, and technical/operational constraints.

design.title: Design
design.description: Architecture, roadmap, and prototypes that reduce risk early.

build.title: Build
build.description: Iterative development with clear engineering standards and regular releases.

scale.title: Scale
scale.description: Monitoring, optimization, and knowledge transfer to your internal teams.

experience.title: Leadership Experience
experience.subtitle: A decade of technology leadership across diverse sectors.

highlights.standards: Engineering standards and Agile at scale
highlights.founder: Technical founder of real market products

caseStudies.title: Case Studies
caseStudies.subtitle: Real products with direct technical leadership.

minnha.title: Minnha — منحة
minnha.description: University admissions and scholarship platform: technical vision, payment integrations, and strategic pivot from donations to admissions services.

hido.title: Hido — هايدو
hido.description: Local tourism platform connecting visitors with authentic experiences hosted by Saudi communities: booking, interactive map, and trusted experiences.

leader.title: About the Leader
leader.name: Abdullah Bin Askar
leader.bio: Technology leader with 10+ years building enterprise solutions across telecom, government, and digital products. Combines executive leadership with hands-on expertise in Java/Spring Boot, Angular, and modern architecture.

cta.title: Ready to start your technology journey?
cta.subtitle: Let's discuss how we can support your vision — from strategy to delivery.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project or inquiry. We'll respond as soon as possible.

form.name: Name
form.success: Thank you! Your message has been received and we'll be in touch soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters

about.title: About Us
about.intro: A technology partner combining executive CTO vision with hands-on engineering — from Riyadh to enterprises and digital products across the Kingdom and region.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We help organizations and startups turn technology vision into reliable digital products — from discovery and design to build and scale, led by a CTO with field experience across telecom, government, and digital products.

enterprise.title: Enterprises & Large Organizations
enterprise.description: Legacy modernization, solution architecture, and digital transformation with enterprise-grade standards.

startups.title: Startups
startups.description: CTO as a Service from idea to launch — architecture, teams, and fast releases.

government.title: Government Sector
government.description: Technology consulting, digital portals, and service programs with high delivery quality.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.description: Transparent technical decisions tied to business goals.

craft.title: Craft
craft.description: High engineering standards from design to production.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We work alongside your internal teams — transferring knowledge and building capability for lasting impact after the project ends.

collect.title: Data We Collect
collect.content: We only collect data you provide through the contact form: name, email, company name (optional), and message text.

use.title: How We Use Your Data
use.content: We use your data solely to respond to your inquiries. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We may use essential cookies to improve browsing experience. We do not use advertising trackers.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For any privacy inquiries, use the contact form on this website.
